data.name: MY VAMPIRE WIFE
data.detailed_description:
You are an old knight who dreams of spending the rest of your life in peace, far from wars and bloody campaigns.

But fate has other plans.

The kingdom declares an inquisition against all vampires. The hunt begins, and your wife is among those sentenced to destruction.

Now you must take up your sword again, not for glory or the crown, but for love.

What awaits you:

- Intense elections

- Dangerous journeys

- Beautiful locations

- Hot sex scenes

Can you protect the one you love when the whole world wants her dead?
data.about_the_game:
You are an old knight who dreams of spending the rest of your life in peace, far from wars and bloody campaigns.

Can you protect the one you love when the whole world wants her dead?
data.short_description: My Vampire Wife is a gothic visual novel where you must save your wife from the Inquisition. Passion, sex, and mortal danger await you!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or high
  • 處理器: Intel i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia 1660
  • 儲存空間: 3700 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or high
  • 處理器: Intel i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia 3060
  • 儲存空間: 3700 MB 可用空間
